name: Deshraj Singh Chouhan
portfolio: Professional Experience (3.5 Years)  With more than three years of industry experience, I have worked on multiple projects where efficiency, creativity, and reliability were critical. My work focuses on transforming ideas into functional digital solutions using AI-driven tools and smart automation.  I have consistently delivered:  Faster workflows through AI automation  User-friendly websites generated and optimized using AI  Custom solutions tailored to business needs, not generic templates  My experience has taught me how to balance innovation with stability—ensuring solutions are both modern and dependable.  Core Expertise  AI Prompt Engineering (Expert Level) I specialize in crafting precise, high-impact AI prompts that produce consistent, high-quality results. This includes prompts for content creation, automation logic, workflows, and website generation.  AI-Powered Website Creation I can design and build complete websites using AI tools—focusing on structure, usability, responsiveness, and real business goals rather than just visuals.  AI Automation I create automation systems that reduce manual work, save time, and increase productivity. From task automation to workflow optimization, my solutions are practical and scalable.  Certifications  Google Certified Professional This certification strengthened my foundation in modern digital practices and validated my skills against global standards.  Awards & Recognition  I have been officially awarded for my progress and performance, recognizing my continuous learning, dedication, and ability to deliver results. This recognition motivates me to keep improving and pushing my limits.  My Work Philosophy  I believe great work comes from:  Understanding the real problem before building a solution  Keeping systems simple, efficient, and future-ready  Continuously learning and adapting in a fast-changing AI landscape  I take pride in my work because every project reflects my name, effort, and values.  Why Work With Me  3.5 years of real-world experience  Strong command of AI prompts and automation  Google-certified and award-recognized professional  Human-focused solutions, not just technical outputs  I am not just building with AI—I am building with purpose.
